code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Users,Phone}from'lucide-react';import{getAIPropertyContext}from'../../services/api';import{toWhatsAppPhone}from'../../utils/phone';import'./StaffDirectory.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const STAFF_LABEL='Staff';export default function StaffDirectory(){const[staff,setStaff]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{getAIPropertyContext().then(ctx=>{const flat=[];const byName={};if(ctx.staff_by_property){for(const list of Object.values(ctx.staff_by_property)){for(const s of list){const name=(s.name||'').trim();if(name&&!byName[name]){byName[name]=s;flat.push({name,phone:s.phone_number||s.phone||'',role:s.role||''});}}}}setStaff(flat);}).catch(()=>setStaff([])).finally(()=>setLoading(false));},[]);if(loading||staff.length===0)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"staff-directory",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"staff-directory-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Users,{size:18}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:STAFF_LABEL})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"staff-directory-list",children:staff.map((s,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"staff-directory-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"staff-name",children:s.name}),s.phone?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("a",{href:`https://wa.me/${toWhatsAppPhone(s.phone)}`,target:"_blank",rel:"noopener noreferrer",className:"staff-phone-link",title:`WhatsApp ${s.name}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Phone,{size:14}),s.phone]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"staff-phone-na",children:"\u2014"})]},`${s.name}-${i}`))})]});}
